instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect sensor faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Sensor_Status equals Invalid.

L4_requirements: IF Sensor_Status = Invalid THEN Transmission_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect communication faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when CAN_Communication_Status equals Lost.

L4_requirements: IF CAN_Communication_Status = Lost THEN Transmission_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect excessive clutch slip.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Clutch_Slip exceeds Slip_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Clutch_Slip > Slip_Threshold THEN Transmission_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect gear ratio mismatch.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Actual_Gear_Ratio deviates from Expected_Gear_Ratio.

L4_requirements: IF Actual_Gear_Ratio != Expected_Gear_Ratio THEN Transmission_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect excessive oil temperature.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Temp_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Temp_Limit THEN Transmission_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect actuator failures.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Shift_Actuator_Status equals Fault.

L4_requirements: IF Shift_Actuator_Status = Fault THEN Transmission_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall isolate faulty components.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall identify faulty subsystem when Fault_Code is detected.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect invalid vehicle speed signals.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Vehicle_Speed_Signal equals Invalid.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed_Signal = Invalid THEN Transmission_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect low hydraulic pressure.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Hydraulic_Pressure falls below Pressure_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Hydraulic_Pressure < Pressure_Limit THEN Transmission_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect unexpected gear disengagement.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Gear_Position deviates from commanded gear.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Position != Commanded_Gear THEN Transmission_Fault = TRUE
